mcps.name: GitHub MCP Server
mcps.description: Access GitHub repositories, issues, PRs, and code search directly from Claude
mcps.longDescription: Official GitHub MCP server providing full access to repositories, issues, pull requests, code search, and repository management. Supports creating issues, reviewing PRs, searching code across repos, and managing branches. One of the most mature and widely-used MCP servers available.
mcps.author: GitHub / Anthropic
mcps.notes: One of the most mature MCP servers. Handles repos, issues, PRs, code search. Essential for any dev workflow.

mcps.name: Filesystem MCP Server
mcps.description: Read, write, and manage local files and directories with sandboxed access
mcps.longDescription: Official filesystem MCP server that provides sandboxed read/write access to local files and directories. Supports file creation, editing, directory listing, file search, and metadata retrieval. Configured with allowed directories for security.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Core server for local file operations. Must configure allowed directories. Essential for build workflows.

mcps.name: Google Drive MCP Server
mcps.description: Search, read, and manage Google Drive files including Docs, Sheets, and Slides
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Google Drive integration. Enables searching files, reading document content, listing folders, and managing Drive resources. Works with Google Docs, Sheets, Slides, and other file types stored in Drive.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Requires Google Cloud OAuth setup. Good for teams on Google Workspace. Official Anthropic reference server.

mcps.name: Slack MCP Server
mcps.description: Read channels, search messages, post updates, and manage Slack workspace interactions
mcps.longDescription: Official Slack MCP server for workspace integration. Supports reading channel history, searching messages across the workspace, posting messages, managing channels, and retrieving user information. Useful for communication automation and context gathering.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Requires Slack Bot token with appropriate scopes. Great for pulling conversation context into workflows.

mcps.name: PostgreSQL MCP Server
mcps.description: Query PostgreSQL databases with read-only access for analysis and reporting
mcps.longDescription: Official PostgreSQL MCP server providing read-only database access. Supports running SELECT queries, describing table schemas, listing databases and tables. Designed for safe data exploration and analysis without risk of data modification.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Read-only by design for safety. Requires connection string. Excellent for data exploration and report generation.

mcps.name: Brave Search MCP Server
mcps.description: Web and local search powered by Brave Search API for research and fact-checking
mcps.longDescription: Official Brave Search MCP server enabling web search and local business search. Supports general web queries, news search, and local business lookups with geographic filtering. Privacy-focused alternative to Google search integration.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Free tier available with rate limits. Paid plans for higher volume. One of the best research MCPs available.

mcps.name: Puppeteer MCP Server
mcps.description: Browser automation — navigate pages, fill forms, take screenshots, extract data
mcps.longDescription: Official Puppeteer MCP server for browser automation. Enables navigating web pages, clicking elements, filling forms, taking screenshots, extracting page content, and running JavaScript in browser context. Powerful for web scraping and testing.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Requires Chrome/Chromium installed. Great for web scraping, screenshot capture, and form automation.

mcps.name: Google Maps MCP Server
mcps.description: Geocoding, directions, place search, and distance calculations via Google Maps
mcps.longDescription: Official Google Maps MCP server providing location services. Supports geocoding addresses, reverse geocoding, route directions, place search, distance matrix calculations, and elevation data. Useful for logistics, field service, and location-based analysis.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Requires Google Maps API key. Free tier has generous limits. Excellent for field service and logistics planning.

mcps.name: Fetch MCP Server
mcps.description: Make HTTP requests and extract clean content from web pages
mcps.longDescription: Official Fetch MCP server for making HTTP requests and retrieving web content. Supports GET/POST requests, extracts readable content from web pages by stripping HTML, and handles various content types. Useful for API integration and web content retrieval.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Lightweight alternative to Puppeteer for simple web content retrieval. No browser dependency needed.

mcps.name: Memory MCP Server
mcps.description: Persistent knowledge graph for storing and retrieving entities, relations, and context
mcps.longDescription: Official Memory MCP server implementing a persistent knowledge graph. Stores entities with observations, creates relations between entities, and supports graph queries. Data persists across sessions in a local JSON file. Useful for building long-term context and institutional memory.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Stores knowledge as a graph in a local JSON file. Good for persistent context across sessions. Lightweight but powerful.

mcps.name: Sequential Thinking MCP Server
mcps.description: Structured step-by-step reasoning for complex problems and multi-stage analysis
mcps.longDescription: MCP server that enables structured sequential thinking for complex problem-solving. Breaks down problems into discrete reasoning steps, supports branching and revision of thought chains, and helps maintain logical consistency across multi-step analyses.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Excellent for complex decision-making. Forces structured reasoning. Pairs well with Research and Decision agents.

mcps.name: Notion MCP Server
mcps.description: Read and manage Notion pages, databases, and workspace content
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Notion integration. Supports reading pages, querying databases, creating and updating pages, searching workspace content, and managing database properties. Useful for teams using Notion as a knowledge base or project tracker.
mcps.author: suekou
mcps.notes: Requires Notion API key. Well-maintained community server. Good alternative to Notion's official API for AI workflows.

mcps.name: Microsoft Graph MCP Server
mcps.description: Access Outlook email, calendar, OneDrive, and Microsoft 365 services
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Microsoft Graph API integration. Provides access to Outlook email (read, send, search), calendar events, OneDrive files, and other M365 services. Critical for businesses running on the Microsoft ecosystem.
mcps.author: jasonkneen
mcps.notes: Requires Azure AD app registration and OAuth. Covers email, calendar, OneDrive, Teams. Key for M365 shops.

mcps.name: SharePoint MCP Server
mcps.description: Read and manage SharePoint document libraries, lists, and site content
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for SharePoint integration. Supports reading document libraries, managing list items, searching site content, and downloading files. Built on Microsoft Graph API for SharePoint-specific operations.
mcps.author: jasonkneen
mcps.notes: Requires SharePoint access via Microsoft Graph. Useful for document management and intranet content workflows.

mcps.name: Excel MCP Server
mcps.description: Read, write, and analyze Excel spreadsheets and CSV files
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Excel and CSV file operations. Supports reading worksheets, writing cell data, creating charts, formula evaluation, and CSV import/export. Handles both .xlsx and .csv formats for data analysis workflows.
mcps.author: haris-mcp
mcps.notes: Handles both xlsx and csv. Good for financial analysis and reporting workflows. Check for formula support depth.

mcps.name: Canva MCP Server
mcps.description: Create, edit, and manage Canva designs programmatically
mcps.longDescription: Official Canva MCP server integration for design management. Supports creating designs from templates, editing design elements, exporting in various formats, managing brand kits, and searching existing designs. Enables AI-assisted design workflows.
mcps.author: Canva
mcps.notes: Available as a native Claude integration. Requires Canva account. Free tier supports basic design operations.

mcps.name: Airtable MCP Server
mcps.description: Query, create, and manage Airtable bases, tables, and records
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Airtable integration. Supports listing bases, querying records with filters, creating and updating records, managing table schemas, and bulk operations. Useful for project management and lightweight CRM workflows.
mcps.author: felores
mcps.notes: Requires Airtable API key. Good for project tracking and lightweight database workflows. Pairs well with reporting.

mcps.name: Monday.com MCP Server
mcps.description: Manage Monday.com boards, items, updates, and automations
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Monday.com project management integration. Supports reading boards and items, creating and updating items, managing columns, posting updates, and triggering automations. Useful for teams using Monday.com for project tracking.
mcps.author: sakce
mcps.notes: Requires Monday.com API token. Best for teams already on Monday.com. Covers boards, items, and updates.

mcps.name: HubSpot MCP Server
mcps.description: Manage HubSpot contacts, deals, companies, and CRM pipelines
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for HubSpot CRM integration. Supports managing contacts, companies, deals, and pipeline stages. Enables search across CRM records, creation of new records, and deal pipeline management for sales workflows.
mcps.author: kompridmcp
mcps.notes: Requires HubSpot API key. Covers contacts, deals, companies. Good for sales pipeline automation.

mcps.name: Stripe MCP Server
mcps.description: Manage Stripe payments, subscriptions, customers, and billing
mcps.longDescription: Official Stripe MCP server for payment and billing management. Supports creating and managing customers, processing payments, handling subscriptions, viewing invoices, and managing product catalogs. Essential for SaaS and e-commerce billing workflows.
mcps.author: Stripe
mcps.notes: Official Stripe agent toolkit. Requires Stripe API keys. Use test mode keys for safety during setup.

mcps.name: Sentry MCP Server
mcps.description: Monitor application errors, view issues, and analyze error trends
mcps.longDescription: Official Sentry MCP server for error monitoring and analysis. Supports viewing issues, searching errors, analyzing error frequency and impact, and retrieving stack traces. Useful for development teams tracking application health.
mcps.author: Sentry
mcps.notes: Official Sentry integration. Requires Sentry auth token. Best for dev teams with active Sentry projects.

mcps.name: Cloudflare MCP Server
mcps.description: Manage Cloudflare DNS, Workers, KV storage, and CDN configuration
mcps.longDescription: Official Cloudflare MCP server for infrastructure management. Supports managing DNS records, deploying Workers, configuring KV storage, managing R2 buckets, and viewing analytics. Useful for web infrastructure and edge computing workflows.
mcps.author: Cloudflare
mcps.notes: Official Cloudflare server. Requires API token. Covers DNS, Workers, KV, R2. Good for web infrastructure management.

mcps.name: Linear MCP Server
mcps.description: Manage Linear issues, projects, cycles, and team workflows
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Linear issue tracking. Supports creating and managing issues, viewing projects and cycles, searching across the workspace, and updating issue status. Popular with engineering teams using Linear for project management.
mcps.author: jerhadf
mcps.notes: Requires Linear API key. Well-maintained. Good for engineering teams on Linear. 800+ GitHub stars.

mcps.name: Figma MCP Server
mcps.description: Access Figma design files, components, and design system data
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Figma integration. Supports reading design files, extracting component data, viewing design tokens, and accessing design system information. Bridges the gap between design and development workflows.
mcps.author: nicholasgriffintn
mcps.notes: Requires Figma personal access token. Useful for design-to-code workflows and component audits.

mcps.name: Todoist MCP Server
mcps.description: Manage Todoist tasks, projects, labels, and productivity workflows
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server for Todoist task management. Supports creating and managing tasks, organizing projects, applying labels and filters, and tracking completion. Good for personal productivity and lightweight project management.
mcps.author: abhiz123
mcps.notes: Requires Todoist API token. Simple setup. Good for personal task management integration.

mcps.name: SQLite MCP Server
mcps.description: Query and manage SQLite databases for local data analysis and storage
mcps.longDescription: Official SQLite MCP server for local database operations. Supports creating databases, running queries, managing tables, and analyzing data. Useful for local data analysis, prototyping, and lightweight data storage without external database dependencies.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: No external database needed — creates local .db files. Great for quick data analysis and prototyping.

mcps.name: Exa Search MCP Server
mcps.description: AI-native search engine for finding relevant content, companies, and research
mcps.longDescription: Exa AI search MCP server providing semantic and keyword search across the web. Specializes in finding companies, research papers, technical content, and news. Returns clean extracted content rather than just links. Strong for business research.
mcps.author: Exa AI
mcps.notes: AI-native search — returns content, not just links. Free tier available. Excellent for company and market research.

mcps.name: Playwright MCP Server
mcps.description: Advanced browser automation with multi-browser support for testing and scraping
mcps.longDescription: Community MCP server built on Playwright for advanced browser automation. Supports Chrome, Firefox, and Safari. Enables page navigation, element interaction, screenshot capture, PDF generation, and complex multi-step browser workflows. More robust than Puppeteer for complex scenarios.
mcps.author: executeautomation
mcps.notes: More robust than Puppeteer for complex browser automation. Multi-browser support. 1500+ GitHub stars.

mcps.name: Gmail MCP Server
mcps.description: Read, search, draft, and manage Gmail emails and threads
mcps.longDescription: Official Gmail MCP integration available through Claude. Supports searching email threads, reading messages, creating drafts, managing labels, and organizing inbox. Native Claude integration for Gmail users.
mcps.author: Anthropic / Google
mcps.notes: Native Claude integration. One-click setup. Covers read, search, draft, label operations on Gmail.

mcps.name: Google Calendar MCP Server
mcps.description: View, create, and manage Google Calendar events and scheduling
mcps.longDescription: Official Google Calendar MCP integration available through Claude. Supports listing calendars, viewing events, creating and updating events, finding available times, and managing RSVPs. Native Claude integration for Google Workspace users.
mcps.author: Anthropic / Google
mcps.notes: Native Claude integration. One-click setup. Handles events, scheduling, availability checks.

mcps.name: Firecrawl MCP Server
mcps.description: Advanced web scraping with JavaScript rendering, crawling, and structured extraction
mcps.longDescription: Firecrawl MCP server for advanced web scraping and content extraction. Handles JavaScript-rendered pages, supports multi-page crawling, extracts structured data, and converts pages to clean markdown. More capable than basic fetch for complex websites.
mcps.author: Mendable AI
mcps.notes: Handles JS-rendered pages that basic fetch cannot. Free tier available. Great for market research and content analysis.

mcps.name: Time MCP Server
mcps.description: Get current time, convert time zones, and calculate date differences
mcps.longDescription: Official Time MCP server for time and date operations. Supports getting current time in any timezone, converting between timezones, calculating date differences, and formatting dates. Simple but essential utility for scheduling and coordination workflows.
mcps.author: Anthropic
mcps.notes: Simple utility server. No API keys needed. Useful for timezone conversions and scheduling workflows.

agents.name: Research Agent
agents.description: Deep context gathering, comparison, and analysis for any business question
agents.longDescription: Core Upstream agent for the Research (RE) block. Gathers context from multiple sources, performs comparison analysis, identifies patterns, and builds comprehensive background for decision-making. First step in most agent chains.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Core Upstream agent. First link in most agent chains. Handles context gathering, competitive analysis, and background research.

agents.name: Decision Agent
agents.description: Structured option evaluation with risk flags and clear recommendations
agents.longDescription: Core Upstream agent for the Decision (DC) block. Takes research output and structures it into clear options with pros/cons, risk flags, cost implications, and a ranked recommendation. Designed to accelerate business decision-making.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Core Upstream agent. Takes Research output and produces structured recommendations with risk flags.

agents.name: Build Agent
agents.description: Output generation — drafts, documents, code, deliverables
agents.longDescription: Core Upstream agent for the Build (BU) block. Generates the actual deliverable based on research and decisions. Handles document drafting, code generation, template creation, email composition, and any tangible output production.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Core Upstream agent. Produces the actual deliverable. Handles docs, code, templates, emails, and other outputs.

agents.name: Finance Agent
agents.description: Cost analysis, budgeting, ROI calculations, and financial modeling
agents.longDescription: Core Upstream agent for the Finance (FI) block. Handles cost analysis, budget creation, ROI calculations, pricing strategy, and financial modeling. Activated for any task with financial implications or money questions.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Core Upstream agent. Handles all financial analysis. Activated automatically for cost/money questions.

agents.name: Gate Agent
agents.description: Approval workflows, authority checks, and quality gates before delivery
agents.longDescription: Core Upstream agent for the Gate (GA) block. Manages approval workflows, checks authority levels, validates outputs against requirements, and ensures quality gates are met before deliverables go external. Prevents premature or unauthorized delivery.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Core Upstream agent. Quality and authority check before external delivery. Skipped on light-tier tasks.

agents.name: Intake Agent
agents.description: Task capture, classification, routing, and chain assembly
agents.longDescription: Core Upstream agent for the Intake (IN) block. Captures incoming tasks, classifies them by type and tier, assembles the appropriate agent chain, and routes work to the correct starting point. The orchestrator of the agent system.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Core Upstream orchestrator. Classifies tasks, assembles chains, routes work. Central to the agent architecture.

agents.name: Risk Auditor Agent
agents.description: Shadow AI audit, IP risk assessment, and compliance evaluation
agents.longDescription: Upstream agent for risk assessment and compliance auditing. Evaluates shadow AI usage across organizations, assesses intellectual property risks, checks regulatory compliance, and generates risk scorecards. Key agent for client engagements.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Upstream audit agent. Used in full-tier tasks and client engagements. Covers shadow AI, IP risk, compliance.

agents.name: Training Builder Agent
agents.description: Creates personalized training scripts and onboarding materials
agents.longDescription: Upstream agent for training content creation. Builds personalized training scripts, onboarding guides, workshop materials, and learning paths. Adapts content to audience technical level and learning objectives.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Upstream training agent. Builds personalized training for clients. Adapts to audience level automatically.

agents.name: Pattern Builder Agent
agents.description: Creates reusable workflow patterns and automation templates
agents.longDescription: Upstream agent for workflow pattern creation. Analyzes business processes, identifies automation opportunities, and builds reusable workflow patterns. Creates templates that can be deployed across similar business contexts.
agents.author: Upstream Consulting
agents.notes: Upstream pattern agent. Builds reusable workflow templates. Key for scaling consulting deliverables.

agents.name: Data Analyst Agent
agents.description: Automated data analysis, visualization recommendations, and insight extraction
agents.longDescription: Community agent for automated data analysis workflows. Ingests datasets, performs statistical analysis, identifies trends and outliers, recommends visualizations, and generates narrative summaries. Works with CSV, Excel, and database sources.
agents.author: wshobson
agents.notes: From wshobson's agents collection. Handles CSV/Excel analysis, trend identification, and visualization recommendations.

agents.name: Email Outreach Agent
agents.description: Personalized email campaign creation, follow-up sequences, and response tracking
agents.longDescription: Community agent for email outreach automation. Generates personalized email sequences, handles follow-up timing, adapts messaging based on recipient context, and tracks response patterns. Useful for sales outreach and marketing campaigns.
agents.author: wshobson
agents.notes: From wshobson's agents collection. Generates personalized outreach sequences. Good for BD workflows.

agents.name: Content Writer Agent
agents.description: Blog posts, social media content, and marketing copy generation
agents.longDescription: Community agent for content creation workflows. Generates blog posts, social media content, marketing copy, newsletters, and documentation. Adapts tone and style to brand guidelines and target audience specifications.
agents.author: wshobson
agents.notes: From wshobson's agents collection. Handles blog, social, and marketing content. Adapts to brand voice.

agents.name: Code Review Agent
agents.description: Automated code review with security checks, style enforcement, and improvement suggestions
agents.longDescription: Community agent for automated code review. Analyzes code for security vulnerabilities, style consistency, performance issues, and best practice violations. Provides actionable improvement suggestions with severity ratings.
agents.author: wshobson
agents.notes: From wshobson's agents collection. Covers security, style, performance. Generates actionable review comments.

agents.name: Meeting Prep Agent
agents.description: Pre-meeting research, agenda creation, talking points, and follow-up summaries
agents.longDescription: Community agent for meeting preparation and follow-up. Researches attendee backgrounds, generates agendas, creates talking points, prepares relevant data summaries, and produces post-meeting action item lists. Useful for business development and client meetings.
agents.author: wshobson
agents.notes: From wshobson's agents collection. Handles pre-meeting research, agenda creation, and post-meeting follow-up.

agents.name: Competitive Intelligence Agent
agents.description: Market monitoring, competitor analysis, and strategic positioning insights
agents.longDescription: Community agent for competitive intelligence gathering. Monitors competitor activities, analyzes market positioning, tracks pricing changes, identifies market trends, and generates strategic insight reports. Useful for business strategy and sales enablement.
agents.author: wshobson
agents.notes: From wshobson's agents collection. Tracks competitors, market trends, pricing. Good for BD and strategy.

agents.name: Invoice Processing Agent
agents.description: Extract data from invoices, match to POs, and route for approval
agents.longDescription: Community agent for accounts payable automation. Extracts data from invoice documents, matches against purchase orders, validates amounts, flags discrepancies, and routes for approval. Reduces manual data entry in finance workflows.
agents.author: wshobson
agents.notes: From wshobson's agents collection. Handles invoice data extraction, PO matching, approval routing.

agents.name: Onboarding Coordinator Agent
agents.description: New hire onboarding task management, checklist automation, and progress tracking
agents.longDescription: Community agent for employee onboarding automation. Manages onboarding checklists, assigns tasks to relevant departments, tracks progress, sends reminders, and ensures compliance with onboarding requirements. Reduces HR overhead for new hire setup.
agents.author: Claude Code Agents
agents.notes: From claudecodeagents.com. Manages checklists, assigns tasks, tracks progress. Good for HR automation.

agents.name: Contract Reviewer Agent
agents.description: Contract analysis, clause extraction, risk flagging, and comparison against templates
agents.longDescription: Community agent for contract review automation. Analyzes contract documents, extracts key clauses, flags unusual or risky terms, compares against standard templates, and generates summary reports. Reduces legal review time for standard agreements.
agents.author: Claude Code Agents
agents.notes: From claudecodeagents.com. Handles clause extraction, risk flagging, template comparison. Good for legal workflows.

agents.name: Social Media Manager Agent
agents.description: Content scheduling, engagement monitoring, and multi-platform posting
agents.longDescription: Community agent for social media management. Generates platform-specific content, schedules posts, monitors engagement metrics, suggests optimal posting times, and tracks brand mentions. Supports LinkedIn, Twitter/X, Instagram, and Facebook.
agents.author: wshobson
agents.notes: From wshobson's agents collection. Multi-platform content generation and scheduling. Good for marketing teams.

agents.name: Project Status Reporter Agent
agents.description: Automated project status reports, milestone tracking, and stakeholder updates
agents.longDescription: Community agent for project reporting automation. Aggregates status from multiple sources, tracks milestones against timelines, identifies blockers, generates executive summaries, and distributes stakeholder updates. Reduces PM reporting overhead.
agents.author: Claude Code Agents
agents.notes: From claudecodeagents.com. Aggregates status, tracks milestones, generates exec summaries. Good for PM workflows.
